title: Security: Chrome on Android can self-intent into CCT, allowing sandboxed iframe allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox bypass.
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
Chrome on Android can launch an intent to itself and open up a CCT. I would say that this would probably count as a popup.  
  
However, an iframe sandbox with allow-popups but not allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox can self-intent into CCT on Chrome. This opens a popup (or
